Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Relates to displaying a flag and plaque in the capitol for raising awareness of veteran suicide
Summary: Provides that space be set aside in the capitol for the display of the Veteran Suicide Awareness and Remembrance Flag and plaque for the raising of awareness of veteran suicide; directs the commissioner of general services to place and maintain such flag and plaque.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public buildings law, in relation to displaying a flag and plaque in the capitol for raising awareness of veteran suicide
